Nazi Looted Booksat Penn Libraries

/markings/err/
← All markings

ERR stamp

The mark of the Nazi task force that systematically looted Jewish libraries. Over a dozen sub-variants exist; the eagle-and-code forms are the most recognisable.

Examples, photographed in the book
clean example — ERR stamp
partly obscured — ink-cancelled after the war

One of more than a dozen distinct Nazi confiscation stamps recorded in these books.

Issuing body
Einsatzstab Reichsleiter Rosenberg (ERR)
Where it appears
Title page and front pastedown
See on the diagram →
In Penn holdings
61 books
Reference
Bencowitz (1946), plate group III
Books carrying this marking →
Penn Libraries · Provenance of looted books · prototypeUncertainty in this record is shown, not hidden.
